articles.headline: $10 Billion in Savings, 30,000 Jobs Lost: Oracle Goes All-In on AI
articles.summary: Oracle is aggressively expanding data-center spending while absorbing new debt to compete in AI infrastructure, resulting in 30,000 job losses. The company's stock has dropped over 50% from September 2025 highs, signaling market concerns about capital intensity and execution risks in the AI race.

articles.headline: Apple Doubles Down on Hardware and Services in Revamped AI Strategy
articles.summary: Apple is shifting AI focus toward on-device processing and ecosystem integration rather than standalone models, prioritizing hardware-software synergy for privacy and performance. This strategy could pressure competitors to innovate beyond software-only solutions and boost device upgrade cycles.

articles.headline: Soluna Reports Record Growth with 4.3GW GPU-Ready Capacity Pipeline
articles.summary: Soluna reported record 2025 growth with a 4.3GW pipeline expansion, $142 million capital raise, and new AI infrastructure initiatives addressing demand for flexible GPU-ready capacity. This indicates significant market pressure to provision specialized compute for enterprise AI workloads.
